main_headline: Discover the Best Prices Across All Indian Online Stores
main_subline: CloudBasket tracks millions of products from Amazon, Flipkart, and more to help you compare prices and find the smartest deals in real-time.

value_props.headline: Real-Time Price Comparison
value_props.description: Compare live prices across 50+ Indian retailers to maximize your monthly savings.

value_props.headline: Instant Price Drop Alerts
value_props.description: Never miss a deal with automated notifications when your favorite products hit the best price.

value_props.headline: Verified Affiliate Discovery
value_props.description: Safely explore curated product links from trusted Indian platforms through our secure Income Shield node.

value_props.headline: Smart Deal Tracking
value_props.description: Discover the best seasonal offers and festive discounts across all major Indian e-commerce categories.

how_it_works.title: Search Your Product
how_it_works.description: Enter the name of any gadget, fashion item, or grocery staple you want to discover at the best price.

how_it_works.title: Compare All Deals
how_it_works.description: Review a comprehensive list of live prices from top Indian retailers and find the smartest value available.

how_it_works.title: Discover and Save
how_it_works.description: Follow our verified affiliate links to your preferred store and complete your journey with maximum bachat.

footer_tagline: India's Ultimate Destination for Smart Price Discovery and Savings.
